title:
Top 3 Morning
Habits
subtitle: SCIENCE-BACKED

items.heading: Hydrate First
items.body: Drink 500ml of water before coffee. Rehydrates your brain after 8hrs of sleep.

items.heading: Sunlight in 30min
items.body: 10 min of natural light resets your circadian clock and boosts serotonin by 30%.

items.heading: No Phone for 1hr
items.body: Starting reactive kills deep focus. Protect the first hour for your own agenda.

voiceover: Here are the top 3 morning habits backed by science.
Number one: hydrate first. Drink 500 milliliters of water before anything else.
Number two: get sunlight within 30 minutes of waking. It resets your body clock.
Number three: avoid your phone for the first hour. Start proactive, not reactive.
Follow for more science-backed life upgrades.
description:
These 3 morning habits take under 30 minutes but completely change your energy, focus, and mood. Science-backed and free. 🧠💧🌞

#MorningRoutine #HabitsOfSuccessful #ProductivityTips #HealthyMorning #MindsetShift #ViralShorts #LearnOnTikTok
